issues.detail: The skill references a Claude-specific file path (.claude/product-marketing-context.md), limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: mailchimp-alternative-page
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers more rubric items, including a detailed comparison table and multiple sections, whereas Response B is shorter and lacks several required sections.

scenarios.name: teamsync-vs-asana-page
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items (TL;DR, comparison table, detailed categories, migration path, target audiences) but lacks testimonials and CTA, whereas Response A misses many core requirements.
